query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId as serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.serviceType,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / NULLIF(s.monthlyCost,0) * 100, 1) as marginPct,
  s.customerExternalId,
  MAX(c.name) as customerName,
  GROUP_CONCAT(bi.externalId ORDER BY bi.externalId SEPARATOR '|') as billingItemIds,
  GROUP_CONCAT(bi.description ORDER BY bi.externalId SEPARATOR '|') as billingItemDescs,
  GROUP_CONCAT(bi.lineAmount ORDER BY bi.externalId SEPARATOR '|') as billingItemAmounts,
  GROUP_CONCAT(bi.billingPlatform ORDER BY bi.externalId SEPARATOR '|') as billingPlatforms
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.supplierName = 'SasBoss'
  AND s.monthlyCost = 49.00
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId
ORDER BY s.monthlyRevenue ASC;

SELECT 
  s.externalId as serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.serviceType,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / NULLIF(s.monthlyCost,0) * 100, 1) as marginPct,
  s.customerExternalId,
  MAX(c.name) as customerName,
  GROUP_CONCAT(bi.externalId ORDER BY bi.externalId SEPARATOR '|') as billingItemIds,
  GROUP_CONCAT(bi.description ORDER BY bi.externalId SEPARATOR '|') as billingItemDescs,
  GROUP_CONCAT(bi.lineAmount ORDER BY bi.externalId SEPARATOR '|') as billingItemAmounts,
  GROUP_CONCAT(bi.billingPlatform ORDER BY bi.externalId SEPARATOR '|') as billingPlatforms
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.supplierName = 'SasBoss'
  AND s.monthlyCost = 49.00
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId
ORDER BY s.monthlyRevenue ASC;
